ACT I

SCENE 1

INT. LIGHTHOUSE KITCHEN - NIGHT

MARA pours cold tea. The radio crackles without voice.

ELIAS (O.S.)
You came back.

MARA
I didn't hear you come down.

SCENE 2

EXT. HARBOUR WALL - DAWN

FISHERMEN haul nets. The foghorn fails mid-blast.

ACT II

SCENE 1

INT. ARCHIVE ROOM - DAY

MARA spreads forged tide tables beside the originals.

HARBOUR MASTER
Those pages were never missing.
